name: Number 27: Dreadnought Dreadnoid
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>２７ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>弩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ど</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>級</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>艦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ドレッドノイド
desc:
2+ Level 4 monsters
At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card destroyed an opponent's monster by battle: You can Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 Rank 10 or higher Machine Xyz Monster by using this face-up card you control as material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon. Transfer its materials to the Summoned monster.) You can only use this effect of "Number 27: Dreadnought Dreadnoid" once per turn. If this face-up card on the field would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can detach 1 material from this card instead.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
mst: Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
